name: @beamhop/shell-relay
description: Run a self-hosted WebSocket signaling relay for beamhop shell's P2P transport.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/cli.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap --banner '#!/usr/bin/env node' --external '@trystero-p2p/ws-relay' && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && chmod +x ./dist/cli.js
